case_title: LENA R. MILLER VS. U FIRST COMMUNITY SERVICES A CALIFORNIA NON-PROFIT

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MILLER, LENA R. AS TO DEFENDANT U FIRST COMMUNITY SERVICES A CALIFORNIA NON-PROFIT CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT U FIRST COMMUNITY SERVICES A CALIFORNIA NON-PROFIT CORPORATION

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MILLER, LENA R. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT U FIRST COMMUNITY SERVICES A CALIFORNIA NON-PROFIT CORPORATION $2,923.48 PRINCIPAL, $8.94 INTEREST, $200.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,132.42, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $337.98 INTEREST, $25.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF MILLER, LENA R.
